**Market conditions:**
- 
Taos County ranks 20th among 33 New Mexico counties for combined acreage of rural properties currently for sale; over $359 million in land listings recorded representing 9,555 acres; average price is $560,282

Average price per acre in Taos area is $27,942

- 
Significant portion of vacant land in region is not privately owned (US Forest Service, Pueblo lands); suitable private vacant land for home construction is limited

sections.builders:
Based on available information, detailed current pricing for the specific models requested was not fully accessible on manufacturer websites. Here is the comprehensive analysis:

## ZOOK CABINS

**Current Pricing & 2025-2026 Changes**

All park models at Zook Cabins include the cost of delivery, whereas other brands may brag about affordability while customers face additional transport costs
. Specific base prices for Heritage, Grove ADU, and Rivara ADU models not publicly listed; custom quote required based on zip code. 
Delivery, set-up, and crane charges are included
.

**Customer Reviews**
Positive: 
Customers researched log homes based on Zook's great floor plans, innovative design features, and excellent customer reviews, with satisfaction regarding quality and craftsmanship
. 
Customers report Matt at Zook Cabins was extremely helpful even through many redesigns, workmanship is outstanding, and delivery and installation was incredible, with strong recommendations
.

Negative: No substantive negative reviews found in search results; one mention of design flexibility leading to extended timelines but ultimately positive outcome.

**New Mexico Delivery**

Zook Cabins serves New Mexico with log cabins designed for year-round living and vacation retreats
. 
A customer had a custom Pioneer series log home delivered to Chama, NM with knowledgeable sales support
.

**New/Discontinued Models**

Modern ADUs by Zook Cabins are 2026 certified modulars, with modern designed single-wide certified modulars available
. Grove and Rivara ADU models confirmed as current offerings as of February-March 2026.

## MIGHTY SMALL HOMES

**Current Pricing & 2025-2026 Changes**

Price and cost estimates for prefab homes from Mighty Small Homes are $140-$328+ per square foot, all inclusive of kit, labor, and site work
. 
Freight costs approximately $4 per mile with a minimum charge of $1,200 from Louisville, Kentucky
. 
Typical lead time is 6 weeks, as little as 4 weeks with zero plan changes
.

**Customer Reviews**
Positive: 
Industry observer came in skeptical but left impressed, noting the kits provide affordable and efficient housing and the assembly process is straightforward
. 
Mighty Small Home kits are 2-3 times more energy-efficient than traditional stick-built homes and their panels make them stronger
.

Negative: No substantive negative reviews in search results.

**New Mexico Delivery**

Freight from Louisville, Kentucky is approximately $4 per mile with minimum $1200 charge; packages arrive on 48-foot flatbed semi requiring on-site unloading with forklift
. Delivery to New Mexico confirmed feasible but specific regional pricing not disclosed.

**New/Discontinued Models**

Models include Cottage 864 sq ft, Duplex in two sizes (1,292 and 2,108 sq ft), Modern in three sizes (256, 600, and 1,200 sq ft), and Ranch in multiple sizes (384, 768, 936, and 1,200 sq ft)
.

## DC STRUCTURES

**Current Pricing & 2025-2026 Changes**
sections.offgrid:
## NM Solar Incentives or Legislation 2025–2026

**State Solar Tax Credit Expansion Proposed** — 
A bill in the 2026 NM Legislature proposes increasing the state solar tax credit from 10% to 30% with the cap increasing from $6,000 to $15,000
. https://350newmexico.org/solar-and-battery-storage/

**Federal Solar Tax Credit Eliminated** — 
President Trump signed legislation on July 4, 2025, which completely cancels the home solar tax credit beginning on January 1, 2026, 10 years before it was supposed to expire
. https://solarsme.com/solarsme-new-mexico/

**Battery Storage Tax Credit Bill Failed** — 
House Bill 51 was introduced on January 21, 2025 and is currently in committee; if passed, it would give individuals a 40% tax credit on purchase and installation costs for an energy storage system up to $6,000
. https://www.energysage.com/local-data/solar-rebates-incentives/nm/

## Taos County Building or Zoning Changes

**Land Use Regulations Update Underway** — 
Taos County has hired Architectural Research Consultants, Inc. to revise and update the Land Use Regulations and Subdivision Regulations, with goals to modernize codes, simplify them into a single land development code, and encourage ecologically sound and sustainable development practices
. https://www.taoscounty.org/492/Land-Use-and-Subdivision-Regulations-Upd

## Alternative Housing: Earthships, Container Homes, A-frames, Park Models

**Pangea Community Off-Grid Development** — 
Pangea Biotecture announced acquisition of the Tarleton Ranch property (300+ acres) in Taos to transform into a sustainable off-grid development combining renewable energy with affordable housing, cultural preservation, and ecological stewardship
. https://pangeabuild.com/pangea-community-a-visionary-off-grid-development-in-taos-new-mexico/

**Greater World Earthship Community Documented** — 
The 600+ acre Greater World Earthship Community sits northwest of Taos, started by Mike Reynolds and Earthship Biotecture, with the community including more than 300 acres of shared land and operating entirely off the grid using solar and wind power
. https://taos.org/discover/earthships-in-taos/

## NM Water Rights or Well Drilling Updates

No current news items found for 2025–2026 meeting your criteria. Regulatory information is available but no recent legislative changes or specific updates for northern New Mexico.
sections.bridge:
## YURTS: 20-24ft INSULATED MODELS

### Pacific Yurts

Base prices range from around $8,600 to $19,500 (as of September 2024)
. 
A yurt costs $11,500 to $35,000 for a 24' diameter kit, depending on the features
. 
Custom yurt kits offer optional features like insulation, a snow and wind kit, an extra door, or glass windows instead of fabric ones
. 
$1,200 off any new 16' - 30' yurt ordered by April 16, 2026
 (current promotion). 
Shipping the unassembled kit costs $400 to $2,400
.
- **Source:** www.yurts.com; 1-800-944-0240

### Colorado Yurt Company (Secret Creek)
Specific 2026 pricing not publicly accessible on current website. 
20% off SIPs and support beams for yurts through April 30
 (current sale). Company offers custom order sales guides. 
Low lead times for build-to-order yurts
.
- **Source:** www.coloradoyurt.com; Montrose, CO headquarters

**Note:** 
Base platform construction and assembly labor add $7,000 to $13,000
. Insulated bases or SIPs for high-altitude cold climate add significant cost.

## RV / 5TH WHEEL: Under $45K, 7000ft Year-Round

Specific inventory listings with prices under $45K were not found in direct search results for Taos/southern Colorado area. General availability indicators:
- 
RV Trader has over 1,664 RVs near Taos, NM, including 1,013 new and 651 used from over 109 sellers

- 
Price range is $15,000 to $100,000 for fifth wheels in Colorado

**Dealers in region:**
- Rocky Mountain RV & Marine (Albuquerque/Santa Fe area): www.rmrv.com
- Myers RV Center (Albuquerque): www.myersrv.com
- Good Sense RV & Motors (Albuquerque): www.goodsenserv.com
- Blue Compass RV (Albuquerque): new.bluecompassrv.com

**Platforms for active listings:** RV Trader (www.rvtrader.com), Facebook Marketplace, Craigslist
